race.comment: TREBILCO (3) was respectable first-up over 1200m and then improved up to the 1400m last time, when only beaten 3/4 of a length in a much stronger race than this. HELLFIRE BAY (6) is one of a few who come here third-up, so has to be nearing peak fitness, and draws to take up a nice position. REYLEGADO (7) hasn't been let go at the jump-outs and has been kept very safe for his debut. Has to be respected. Same can be said for fellow debutant AMBITIOUS ACHIEVER (5) who also has to be kept safe.
